privileged_info_summary: The task specifies configuring Stellarium for a simulated observation of Mars during the Perseverance landing on 2021-02-18 at 20:30:00 UTC. The required locations are Madrid (Lat 40.427, Lon -4.250) and Goldstone (Lat 35.426, Lon -116.890). Goldstone's coordinates translate to approx 0.6183 and -2.0401 radians respectively, which are explicitly checked by the verifier logic. The required view settings exactly match the metadata (atmosphere=false, landscape=false, azimuthal_grid=true). Verification confirms that these real-world astronomy and geography metrics match the underlying evaluation logic and export scripts.
